steps.t: Ingold is the Captain of the Out-wall, and can be found at the North-gate in the Rammas Echor. Prince Imrahil has asked you to learn why Ingold has no…
If he still lives, Barathant should be somewhere within the town of Crithost, in Talath Anor. Ingold asked you to find Barathant after you defeated so…
Barathant is in the town of Crithost, in Talath Anor. You defeated many foes and should now return to Crithost.
